# 新闻速递 2026-04-21

## Shopee
- 2026年初Shopee畅销面膜榜单揭示外国品牌主导地位，反映市场偏好及竞争格局。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAJBVV95cUxNTkktSXg5WFdERF8yQ2pRM2RGajJmeTY5cVdNT0J2WkhQdkVEMTRoV2FlUGJrdzBLQUhja05BV1lVd05oRTA3Nk55N3lNckQ4aVlfOTFzc19DcXZWQl_1alNtN2hCN0d1YlNzbjJ5RlZWMjlfMXpmWW1JSGNYc3ctcnhmT18tR3VyM1lxQWJYVWhCbFZ2RDBrYVRqaFF6aXNqaGVDZjkydFM3Rjc2ZU5FM243dVJ2dFpyTUQwWWZ1dlJHZ19WQXdZclVwVlZtallVelpoa3ZRSTZNanhVQzRHNmhVODVGNkk4M2M3RmlFX1BtRWJQdkg4WWg1THV2cUc3LUFMUmFiUjFfM1p2a0dheDJ2Rk5BTVhS?oc=5)）
- MCMC与Shopee推出NADI计划，深化小型企业数字化转型，助力其拓展数字市场。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- SHIMANO DEORE SLX液压碟刹套装在Shopee马来西亚上架，丰富其骑行品类，满足当地消费者需求。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxQQlpVcVhjbHpwa09OR3Q4bnNOSXh2TU9EX1BRNXBvakkya0Z5aGcteFFuTkNRQjlCbWVjcGM4TWJfUF9FU09BRldDblZIOUYxMy1FdTFyUWFKV2phV3pOaFN5dDRBc0NBd1l0MUFzRmNHRDNlYVloc2pzLXJzdDYwclVwd3h2VDlpNzhoWEYxWWJONlRWN2NMOWRfUW9saUVQaHg5Zg?oc=5)）

## Tencent
- 腾讯QClaw开放国际测试，使非技术用户通过消息应用部署AI，降低AI应用门槛。（[Technode](https://technode.com/2026/04/21/tencents-qclaw-opens-international-beta/)）

## Coupang
- 《哈利·波特》系列回归并在Coupang Play独家上线，有望增强平台内容吸引力及用户粘性。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiVkFVX3lxTE5lMDkwaGFtc3lJNi1Oa2tRT2FGQnY1ckQ3aEYwWHN1OW9Za001Y0RlQ3M5WUNxSHNyaVdCc1lJajFDVGtONGg4cmJuMGhiT1psbG95aG1n?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre通过严格的“Caviar Cruise”优质投资筛选，显示其财务强劲和增长潜力，提升市场信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
